description: Vault retrieval quality probes. Each probe is a (query, expectedChunkIds) pair. After Wave 1 scaffolding lands, the WS5 parser overhaul populates these with hand-labeled top-1 chunks from a canonical set of 5 document types: sell-side research note, earnings call transcript, SEC filing, macro outlook piece, and internal investment memo. The MRR and precision@5 metrics are published in CI on every PR touching server/services/vault.js or server/services/agentOrchestrator.js.

probes.query: what did Goldman say about TSMC capex guidance last quarter
probes.notes: TODO: hand-label once golden docs are ingested

probes.query: summarize consensus view on European banks Q4 earnings
what is the bull case for Korean semiconductors in 2026
FOMC statement language change from previous meeting
Petrobras dividend policy under the new government
